modifications.rationale: Both tools mention ServeHTTP. Qualified form Engine.ServeHTTP shows structural understanding.
Keep as-is, already specific enough (unexported method name).
Both tools easily hit 5 files. Sense got 6, baseline got 9. Raise to 7 to test depth.
'Next' is too generic. Context.Next is the actual qualified method.
'Abort' is too generic. Context.Abort is the actual qualified method.
Sense found dead code via sense_graph but used 'unused' not 'dead'. Both terms are valid for dead code analysis.
Dead code detection is a structural task. Using grep to find dead code is fundamentally less reliable than graph analysis.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for dispatch chain tracing

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph for callees — this is the right tool for dispatch tracing.

new_check.description: Used structural graph query for dead code detection

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph dead_code for this step — graph-based dead code detection is more reliable.

new_check.description: Used blast radius analysis for modification impact

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_blast for CustomRecoveryWithWriter — impact analysis is exactly what blast is for.
